consumables.name: Antitoxin
consumables.effect: Advantage on saving throws against Poison for 1 hour.

consumables.name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
consumables.effect: Cast a Level 1 spell without a spell slot. Scroll is destroyed after use.
consumables.requirement: Must have the spell on your class list.

consumables.name: Alchemist's Fire
consumables.effect: Thrown (20ft). Target takes 1d4 fire damage at start of every turn until doused.

adventuring_gear.name: Crowbar
adventuring_gear.effect: Advantage on Strength checks where leverage can be applied.

adventuring_gear.name: Grappling Hook
adventuring_gear.effect: Required for climbing surfaces without natural handholds.

adventuring_gear.name: Lantern, Hooded
adventuring_gear.effect: Bright light (30ft), Dim light (30ft). Hood can be closed to hide light.

adventuring_gear.name: Spyglass
adventuring_gear.effect: Magnifies objects to twice their size. Required for long-range scouting.

adventuring_gear.name: Rations (1 Day)
adventuring_gear.effect: Prevents Exhaustion. Includes jerky, dried fruit, and hardtack.

adventuring_gear.name: Healer's Kit
adventuring_gear.effect: Stabilize a creature at 0 HP without an Ability Check.

tools_and_kits.name: Thieves' Tools
tools_and_kits.effect: Required to pick locks and disarm traps. Uses Dexterity (Proficiency).
tools_and_kits.contents: Small file, lock picks, mirror, pliers.

tools_and_kits.name: Alchemist's Supplies
tools_and_kits.effect: Required to craft Potions, Acid, and Alchemist's Fire.

tools_and_kits.name: Disguise Kit
tools_and_kits.effect: Required to create physical disguises. Uses Charisma (Proficiency).

tools_and_kits.name: Poisoner's Kit
tools_and_kits.effect: Required to harvest venom and craft toxins for weapons.

tools_and_kits.name: Smith's Tools
tools_and_kits.effect: Required to repair damaged armor/weapons and craft metal items.
